tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because the English witness expands 1 Chinese stanzas into 2 English blocks that cannot be matched safely.

tuv.seg: 芃芃棫樸，薪之槱之。濟濟辟王，左右趣之。 濟濟辟王，左右奉璋。奉璋峨峨，髦士攸宜。 淠彼涇舟，烝徒楫之。周王于邁，六師及之。 倬彼雲漢，為章于天。周王壽考，遐不作人。 追琢其章，金玉其相。勉勉我王，綱紀四方。

Abundant is the growth of the buckthorn and shrubby trees, Supplying firewood; yea, stores of it. Elegant and dignified was our prince and king; On the left and the right they hastened to him.
Elegant and dignified was our prince and king; On his left and his right they bore their half-mace (libation-cups):— They bore them with solemn gravity, As beseemed such eminent officers.
